title: 我的博客
subTitle: 记录生活与技术
style: body { background-size: cover; background-attachment: fixed; background-position: center; background-repeat: no-repeat; transition: background-image 0.5s ease-in-out; } .markdown-body { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); border-radius: 10px; padding: 30px; } .side-nav { position: fixed; left: 0; top: 0; bottom: 0; width: 240px; padding: 20px; overflow-y: auto; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); z-index: 999; border-right: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1); box-shadow: 2px 0 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); } .side-nav-group { margin-bottom: 20px; } .side-nav-header { font-weight: bold; font-size: 15px; color: #444; margin-bottom: 8px; border-bottom: 2px solid #0969da; padding-bottom: 4px; display: inline-block; } .side-nav a { display: block; text-decoration: none; color: #333; font-size: 13px; padding: 6px 10px; border-radius: 4px; transition: all 0.2s; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; margin-bottom: 2px; } .side-nav a:hover { background: #0969da; color: #fff; transform: translateX(5px); } .bg-switch-btn { position: fixed; left: 20px; bottom: 20px; z-index: 1000; padding: 8px 16px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.6); color: white; border: none; border-radius: 20px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; transition: 0.3s; backdrop-filter: blur(5px); } .bg-switch-btn:hover { background: #000; } @media (min-width: 1400px) { .markdown-body { margin-left: 260px; } } @media (max-width: 1399px) { .side-nav { display: none; } }
script: <script>document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() { const bgKey = 'blog_bg_url'; function setBg(url) { document.body.style.backgroundImage = 'url(' + url + ')'; localStorage.setItem(bgKey, url); } function loadBingBg(random = false) { const timestamp = new Date().getTime(); const baseUrl = 'https://bing.img.run/1920x1080.php'; const url = random ? baseUrl + '?random=' + timestamp : baseUrl; setBg(url); } const savedBg = localStorage.getItem(bgKey); if (savedBg) { setBg(savedBg); } else { loadBingBg(false); } const btn = document.createElement('button'); btn.className = 'bg-switch-btn'; btn.innerText = '🎨 切换壁纸'; btn.onclick = () => loadBingBg(true); document.body.appendChild(btn); const repoName = document.querySelector('meta[name="repository-name"]') ? document.querySelector('meta[name="repository-name"]').content : ''; const blogBaseUrl = (window.location.pathname.includes(repoName) ? '/' + repoName : '') + '/blogBase.json'; fetch(blogBaseUrl).then(res => res.json()).then(data => { const nav = document.createElement('div'); nav.className = 'side-nav'; const posts = Object.values(data); const groups = {}; posts.forEach(post => { const label = post.labels[0] || 'Default'; if (!groups[label]) groups[label] = []; groups[label].push(post); }); const sortedLabels = Object.keys(groups).sort(); sortedLabels.forEach(label => { const items = groups[label]; const groupDiv = document.createElement('div'); groupDiv.className = 'side-nav-group'; const header = document.createElement('div'); header.className = 'side-nav-header'; header.innerText = label; groupDiv.appendChild(header); items.forEach(item => { const link = document.createElement('a'); link.href = item.postUrl; link.innerText = item.postTitle; link.title = item.postTitle; groupDiv.appendChild(link); }); nav.appendChild(groupDiv); }); document.body.appendChild(nav); }).catch(err => console.log('Sidebar load failed', err)); });</script>
